Class MessageUtils

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.verify.util.MessageUtils
public class MessageUtils extends Object
Utility class for constructing user-facing Adventure Component messages. Centralizes the formatting logic for kick messages, cooldown notifications, and success alerts.

    static net.kyori.adventure.text.Component
    buildCooldownMessage(long expiryMillis, org.bukkit.configuration.file.FileConfiguration config)
    Builds a message informing the player they are on cooldown due to excessive attempts.

    buildErrorMessage(org.bukkit.configuration.file.FileConfiguration config)

    Builds a message for when a previously verified session fails re-verification.
    static net.kyori.adventure.text.Component
    buildVerificationMessage(PlayerIdentity identity)
    Builds a success message to be shown to the player (and potentially staff).

  • Method Details

    • buildKickMessage

      public static net.kyori.adventure.text.Component buildKickMessage(VerificationResponse response, org.bukkit.configuration.file.FileConfiguration config)
      Builds a kick message based on the API verification response.
      Parameters:
      response - the API response
      config - the plugin configuration for localized messages
      Returns:
      a formatted Adventure Component

    • buildCooldownMessage

      public static net.kyori.adventure.text.Component buildCooldownMessage(long expiryMillis, org.bukkit.configuration.file.FileConfiguration config)
      Builds a message informing the player they are on cooldown due to excessive attempts.
      Parameters:
      expiryMillis - the timestamp when the cooldown expires
      config - the plugin configuration
      Returns:
      a formatted Component with the remaining time

    • buildErrorMessage

      public static net.kyori.adventure.text.Component buildErrorMessage(org.bukkit.configuration.file.FileConfiguration config)
      Builds a generic error message for API failures.
      Parameters:
      config - the plugin configuration
      Returns:
      a formatted Component

    • buildReverificationFailureMessage

      public static net.kyori.adventure.text.Component buildReverificationFailureMessage(org.bukkit.configuration.file.FileConfiguration config)
      Builds a message for when a previously verified session fails re-verification.
      Parameters:
      config - the plugin configuration
      Returns:
      a formatted Component

    • buildVerificationMessage

      public static net.kyori.adventure.text.Component buildVerificationMessage(PlayerIdentity identity)
      Builds a success message to be shown to the player (and potentially staff).
      Parameters:
      identity - the verified player identity
      Returns:
      a formatted Component with the forum username
